details.test: Task 1: Register two children for July 2025 morning summer Bible camp under $200
Task 2: Create $35 monthly donation to Children's Bible Story Kits with dedication and offline payment
Task 3: Save three Easter crafts (ages 6-8, <=30 min) into a collection
Task 4: Add two Fruit of the Spirit curriculum sets for two age groups to cart
Task 5: Apply for in-person Sunday morning kids volunteer role within 10 miles of 30309
Task 6: Create April 2025 Parables lesson series for ages 5-7 and order weeks
Task 7: Subscribe to weekly parent newsletter for ages 8-10 with devotions topics
Task 8: Sponsor child aged 6-9 interested in reading & Bible stories with $30-40 monthly pledge
